gate_and.comment: 4-state AND: a0 = gate_and(a0, a1), 32 signals in parallel

gate_or.comment: 4-state OR: a0 = gate_or(a0, a1), 32 signals in parallel

gate_xor.comment: 4-state XOR: a0 = gate_xor(a0, a1), 32 signals in parallel

gate_not.comment: 4-state NOT: a0 = gate_not(a0), 32 signals in parallel
